description: Create an interactive GeoGebra applet demonstrating Fourier series convergence to a square wave with period 2π and amplitude 1. The applet must include an integer slider n ranging from 1 to 20 and the Fourier partial sum function g(x) = (4/π) * Σ [sin((2k-1)x)/(2k-1)] for k from 1 to n. Style the functions distinctly, include a text annotation displaying the value of n, and save the project as fourier_square_wave.ggb in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
